---
title: "LiverRNA F0 analysis"
author: "Leonard C. Steg"
date: '2025-10-16'
output: html_document
---
```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(edgeR)
  library(RColorBrewer)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(SummarizedExperiment)
  library(cowplot)
  library(SEtools)
  library(gprofiler2)
  library(rtracklayer)
  library(dplyr)
})
```


Read in pheno file with metadata
```{r}
pheno <- read.csv("Steg2026/LiverRNA/pheno.csv", row.names = 1)
```

Load DEA function
```{r}
source("Steg2026/LiverRNA/scripts/dea.RNA.Liver.F0.R")
```

Run DEA for B6 F0 Males
```{r}
dea.RNA.Liver.F0(pheno = pheno, strain = "B6", generation = "F0", sex = "Male", 
                 VarExp = "Group", CtrGroup = "CTR", ExpGroup = "LPD", 
                 outputdir = "Steg2026/LiverRNA/results/03_dea/", 
                 salmondir = "Steg2026/LiverRNA/results/preprocess_01/05_salmon_quant/",
                 suffix ="Basemodel")
```

Run DEA for PWK F0 Males
```{r}
dea.RNA.Liver.F0(pheno = pheno, strain = "PWK", generation = "F0", sex = "Male", 
                 VarExp = "Group", CtrGroup = "CTR", ExpGroup = "LPD", 
                 outputdir = "Steg2026/LiverRNA/results/03_dea/", 
                 salmondir = "Steg2026/LiverRNA/results/preprocess_01/05_salmon_quant/",
                 suffix ="Basemodel")
```

Load functions for plotting
```{r}
source("Steg2026/scripts/VolcanoPlotGGPlot.R")

source("Steg2026/scripts/GoTermBarplot.R")
```

Load B6 F0 results and plot volcano plot and GO bar plot
```{r} 
dir <- "Steg2026/LiverRNA/results/03_dea/B6-F0-Male-Basemodel/"

se.b6 <- readRDS(paste0(dir,"SE.rds"))

VolcanoPlotGGPlot(dataframe = as.data.frame(rowData(se.b6)), logFC = "dea.logFC", PValues = "dea.padj",
                  xlimits = 6, ylimits = 28,
                  color.highlight ="#404040" ,output = dir)

GoTermBarplot(GO.res = metadata(se.b6)$go_merged, color.low = "#E1E1E1", color.high = "#404040",xlimits = 10,
              output = dir,print = T)

res.b6 <- as.data.frame(rowData(se.b6))

sum(res.b6$dea.padj < 0.05 & res.b6$dea.logFC > 0.5)
#54
sum(res.b6$dea.padj < 0.05 & res.b6$dea.logFC < -0.5)
#131

```

Load PWK F0 results and plot volcano plot and GO bar plot
```{r} 
dir <- "Steg2026/LiverRNA/results/03_dea/PWK-F0-Male-Basemodel/"

se.pwk <- readRDS(paste0(dir,"SE.rds"))

VolcanoPlotGGPlot(dataframe = as.data.frame(rowData(se.pwk)), logFC = "dea.logFC", PValues = "dea.padj", 
                  xlimits = 6, ylimits = 28,
                  color.highlight ="#B59031" ,output = dir)

GoTermBarplot(GO.res = metadata(se.pwk)$go_merged, color.low = "#f7d9c6", color.high = "#B59031", xlimits = 10,
              output = dir,print = T)

res.pwk <- as.data.frame(rowData(se.pwk))

sum(res.pwk$dea.padj < 0.05 & res.pwk$dea.logFC > 0.5)
#47
sum(res.pwk$dea.padj < 0.05 & res.pwk$dea.logFC < -0.5)
#83

```

Supplements:
Violin plots for some selected genes in B6 and PWK fathers
```{r}
genes <- c("Smpd3","Fgf21", "Lepr")

source("Steg2026/scripts/plot_violin_gene.R")

# Plot for B6 results
for (i in 1:length(genes)) {
    plot_violin_gene(se = se.b6, assay = "logcpm",  genes[i],
                   name = paste0("ViolinPlot_", genes[i],".pdf"), 
                   outdir = "Steg2026/LiverRNA/results/03_dea/B6-F0-Male-Basemodel/ViolinPlots/")
  
}

# Plot for PWK results
for (i in 1:length(genes)) {
    plot_violin_gene(se = se.pwk, assay = "logcpm",  genes[i],
                   name = paste0("ViolinPlot_", genes[i],".pdf"), 
                   outdir = "Steg2026/LiverRNA/results/03_dea/PWK-F0-Male-Basemodel/ViolinPlots/")
  
}
```

Plot the overlap between B6 and PWK DEGs
```{r}
b6.up <- res.b6[res.b6$dea.padj < 0.05 & res.b6$dea.logFC > 0.5,]
# 54
b6.down <- res.b6[res.b6$dea.padj < 0.05 & res.b6$dea.logFC < -0.5,]
# 131

pwk.up <- res.pwk[res.pwk$dea.padj < 0.05 & res.pwk$dea.logFC > 0.5,]
# 47
pwk.down <- res.pwk[res.pwk$dea.padj < 0.05 & res.pwk$dea.logFC < -0.5,]
# 83

overlap.up <- b6.up[rownames(b6.up) %in% rownames(pwk.up),]
# 2
overlap.down <- b6.down[rownames(b6.down) %in% rownames(pwk.down),]
# 5

# Plot as barplot:

df <-  as.data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow = 6, ncol = 3, dimnames = list(NULL, c("Direction", "Overlap", "Number"))))

df$Direction <- c(rep("Up", 3), rep("Down", 3))

df$Overlap <- rep(c("B6 specific", "Overlap", "PWK specific"), 2)

df[1,]$Number <- nrow(b6.up) - nrow(overlap.up)
df[2,]$Number <- nrow(overlap.up)
df[3,]$Number <- nrow(pwk.up) - nrow(overlap.up)
df[4,]$Number <- nrow(b6.down) - nrow(overlap.down)
df[5,]$Number <- nrow(overlap.down)
df[6,]$Number <- nrow(pwk.down) - nrow(overlap.down)

# (Optional) order the fill so the stack is consistent
df$Overlap <- factor(df$Overlap, levels = c("B6 specific", "Overlap", "PWK specific"))
df$Direction <- factor(df$Direction, levels = c("Down", "Up"))

# Optional totals (for label above bars)
totals <- df %>%
  group_by(Direction) %>%
  summarise(Total = sum(Number), .groups = "drop")

# Plot as counts
overlap.b6.pwk <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Direction, y = Number, fill = Overlap)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = ifelse(Number > 0, Number, "")),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    size = 3
  ) +
  # optional: add total above each bar
  geom_text(
    data = totals,
    aes(x = Direction, y = Total, label = Total),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    vjust = -0.3,
    size = 3
  ) + 
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "B6 specific"  = "#404040",
      "Overlap"      = "#CCCCCC",
      "PWK specific" = "#E9945E"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Number of DEGs",
    fill = "Expression",
    title = "Overlaps between father liver RNA-seq results"
  ) +
  theme_cowplot(font_size = 8) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")  # keeps the total label visible if it sits above the panel


ggsave("overlap.b6.pwk.number.pdf", plot = overlap.b6.pwk, device = NULL, path = "Steg2026/LiverRNA/results/", 
       width = 5, height = 5, units = "cm")
```
